Hydra Scheduler — Overview

Hydra Scheduler is a distributed cron-style task orchestrator built for batch workloads. Hydra Scheduler dispatches scheduled tasks to a fleet of stateless workers; tasks declare CPU and memory resource requirements and Hydra Scheduler bin-packs them onto the worker pool. The Hydra Scheduler control plane is a Raft-replicated leader that owns the priority queue and the cron trigger calendar. Workers pull tasks from Hydra Scheduler over a long-poll gRPC stream and report task heartbeats back to the leader.
